name: HWR_SRC_SOURCE_VL
query: SELECT B.SOURCE_ID, B.SOURCE_TYPE_ID, B.SOURCE_TYPE_VERSION_ID, B.CONNECTION_SPEC, B.IS_INTERNAL, B.IS_RECRUITING, B.SYNC_STATE_CLOB, T.NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, SRCTYPEB.SOURCE_TYPE_KEY as APPLICATION_NAME, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_SRC_SOURCE_B B, HWR_SRC_SOURCE_TL T, HWR_SRC_SRCTYPE_B SRCTYPEB WHERE B.SOURCE_ID = T.SOURCE_ID AND SRCTYPEB.SOURCE_TYPE_ID = B.SOURCE_TYPE_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
